[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a simple graphic with large black text, a small red car icon, and a sunflower illustration on a white background.

A small red car icon appears near the left-middle of the image, while a stylized sunflower with a dark center and green leaves appears on the right side. The main visual focus is the layered black text reading “gppa”, “iya”, and “gapapa” arranged in multiple lines.

The setting is unclear but the background is plain white, suggesting a digital graphic or poster layout rather than a real-world scene. Lighting and weather are not applicable because no natural environment is visible.

The text is black and set in a large, bold, sans-serif style, with line breaks that display “gppa” on the top left, “iya” directly below it, and “gapapa” as a longer line beneath. The sunflower is bright yellow with a dark circular center and green elements beneath it. The red car icon is small, facing to the right, with simple rounded shapes and dark window areas. The composition is flat and centered toward the left for the car and text, with the sunflower more on the right. The camera angle is not applicable.

Visible Text:
gppa
iya
gapapa

Practical Summary:
This image is a text-and-icon graphic on a white background. It combines black lettering with a small red car illustration and a sunflower on the right.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

gppa  
iya  
gapapa

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
